requirement_topic.en: Albania Storage-Project Grid-Connection and Market Activity Review
requirement_topic.zh: 阿尔巴尼亚储能项目并网与市场活动审查
requirement_topic.zht: 阿爾巴尼亞儲能項目併網與市場活動審查

summary.en: Albania does not publish a single public whole-unit BESS grid code for all storage models, and storage projects are reviewed by ERE and OST according to installation size, market role, grid point, and market-participation route. For Albania-facing files, provide ERE activity classification, connection point documentation, power-quality assumptions, protection coordination, metering and dispatch interfaces, and commissioning evidence before site energisation.
summary.zh: 阿尔巴尼亚尚无覆盖全部储能型号的公开统一BESS并网制度，储能项目根据装机规模、市场角色、接入点和市场参与路径由ERE与OST审查。面向阿尔巴尼亚的资料应提交ERE业务类别、接入点文件、电能质量假设、保护配合、计量与调度接口以及投运前验收证据。
summary.zht: 阿爾巴尼亞尚無涵蓋全部儲能型號的公開統一 BESS 併網制度，儲能項目依據裝機規模、市場角色、接入點和市場參與路徑由 ERE 與 OST 審查。面向阿爾巴尼亞的資料應提交 ERE 業務類別、接入點文件、電能品質假設、保護配合、計量與調度介面以及投運前驗收證據。

standards_or_laws: ERE licensing and storage-market rulebook (as applicable)
OST grid-code and interconnection practices for the project connection point
IEC 62933-2-1 / IEC 62933-5-2 for internationally expected BESS evidence where referenced

summary.en: China references often use GB/T 36558-2023 and related grid-company procedures for energy storage grid integration. These are useful technical baselines but do not grant automatic permission for Albanian interconnection or market participation without local project approval.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用GB/T 36558-2023及相关电网公司程序处理储能接网技术，但仅可作为技术基线，不能在无当地项目批准前变更为阿尔巴尼亚并网或市场参与许可。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用GB/T 36558-2023及相關電網公司程序處理儲能接網技術，但僅可作為技術基線，不能在無當地項目批准前轉化為阿爾巴尼亞併網或市場參與許可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 (Technical requirements for grid-connected electrochemical storage)
China grid-company interconnection and project acceptance practices

gap.en: The main gaps are Albanian project-level approval route, connection agreement terms, and parameter settings. Exporters should confirm voltage/frequency windows and protection settings, produce OST-accepted single-line diagrams, commissioning files, protection and SCADA interface evidence, and verify market-participation conditions before energisation.
gap.zh: 主要差距是阿尔巴尼亚项目层面审批路径、接入协议条款和参数设置。出口商应确认电压/频率范围与保护参数，提供OST认可的单线图、调试文件、保护及SCADA接口证据，并在送电前确认市场参与条件。
gap.zht: 主要差距是阿爾巴尼亞項目層面審批路徑、接入協議條款和參數設置。出口商應確認電壓／頻率範圍與保護參數，提供 OST 認可的單線圖、調試文件、保護及 SCADA 介面證據，並在送電前確認市場參與條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Albanian projects require ERE and OST approval, and where grid-study and connection documentation are required by the grid operator and project structure
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China GB/T evidence does not replace Albanian market-activity and grid-connection authorization

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T project procedures are not Albanian grid-connection approval. Confirm ERE route, OST interconnection terms, and project-specific protection and dispatch settings for each BESS installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T项目程序不能替代阿尔巴尼亚并网批准。应为每套储能安装确认ERE路径、OST接入条款以及项目特定保护和调度参数。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T項目程序不能替代阿爾巴尼亞併網批准。應為每套儲能裝置確認 ERE 路徑、OST 接入條款以及項目特定保護和調度參數。
